title: R2z-DL
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type=Rebel |image=[[File:R2Z-DL-CRO.png]] |name=R2z-DL
"Toozy" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model=[[R2z Starship Maintenance Droid]]''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' |class=[[Maintenance droid/Legends|Maintenance droid]] |cost=3,200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |length= |width= |height=1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] programming |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} '''R2z-DL''', nicknamed '''Toozy''', was the only [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] to ever earn the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Rohal Cross]] for valor. The unit was owned by a deep-cover Alliance [[R2z-DL's operative|operative]] at one time. When the [[Agent/Legends|agent]] was assassinated by the minions of [[Laboi]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Qa'till]], Qa'till took the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and placed it in his labor pool on [[Hypotria]]. Toozy remained loyal to the Alliance, stealing information from [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and relaying important data back to the Alliance. The droid tipped off [[Koedi Raef]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] movements near [[Vilosoria]]. As a result Raef was awarded the Rohal Cross for successful [[Liberation of Vilosoria|liberation]] of the planet, but the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] refused it and gave it to Toozy. ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=R2z-DL }} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Droids of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Category:R2z Starship Maintenance Droids]]
